ogTitle: Barwon Downs vs Basalt: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barwon Downs and Basalt.
heading: Barwon Downs vs Basalt — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barwon Downs, Victoria and Basalt, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barwon Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Basalt (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barwon Downs or Basalt safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barwon Downs has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Basalt scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barwon Downs scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Basalt scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barwon Downs or Basalt?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barwon Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
